title: claytonia menziesii
intro: Claytonia menziesii, also known as Miner's lettuce, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant has been known to provide various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as supporting eye health and immune function. Claytonia menziesii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or added to salads, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
